heading: Assistance from other Government agencies
label: 1465dd Assistance from other Government agencies
text: In order to assist the Broadcasting Board of Governors in carrying out the provisions of this subchapter, any agency or instrumentality of the United States may sell, loan, lease, or grant property (including interests therein) and may perform administrative and technical support and services at the request of the Board.
notes: Repeal of SectionSection repealed upon transmittal of determination by President under that democratically elected government in Cuba is in power, see .section 6063(c)(3) of this titlesection 6037(c) of this title

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Television Broadcasting to Cuba Act which comprises this subchapter, and not as part of the United States Information and Educational Exchange Act of 1948 which comprises this chapter.
Amendments1998— substituted “Broadcasting Board of Governors” for “United States Information Agency” and “the Board” for “the Agency”.Pub. L. 105–277
